subject: Re: flight crew to LSJ
body:
no... not till next mon

----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Sent: Sunday, February 4, 2007 7:17:41 PM
Subject: flight crew to LSJ



 

Jeffrey, Bill and I  are scheduled to leave Miami at Noon on 
Monday,

I have George scheduled from Philly also,

Are we still wheels up Tues of this week?

Please advise?

Larry V
